theme: AI in Action proof-of-theory education system
build_prompt: Create an AI skill drill coach that teaches one useful skill with a frontend lesson panel, backend status route, Supabase proof records, and a validation report. The first skill should be practical prompt engineering for small business automation. The system should explain the lesson, show a short drill, provide a practice prompt, record proof of the sandbox request, expose status through a backend route, show the request on the AI in Action dashboard, and produce a validation/reporting trail. Keep it sandbox-only with no public publishing and no paid API activation.
